markdownRemark.html:
I'm Luis. When it comes to programming, I enjoy making web apps, user interfaces, and automating things. You can explore my favorite GitHub repositories by clicking through them in the left-hand pane. I try to go pretty in-depth into each repository.

If you wanted, you could probably hire me to design your site. Make me an offer I couldn't refuse at luiscollado26@gmail.com.

If you're interested, and by that I mean only if you're interested, you can check out the music I make at my linktr.ee.
